---
title: Posters
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
listing:
  contents:
    - .
    - date: 2025-08-20
      author:
        - Patrick Roddy
        - "[Saransh Chopra](https://github.com/Saransh-cpp)"
        - "[Nicolas Tessore](https://github.com/ntessore)"
      path: euroscipy-2025/index.svg
      subtitle: "[EuroSciPy 2025](https://euroscipy.org)"
      title: Porting GLASS to the Python Array API
    - date: 2026-06-16
      author:
        - Patrick Roddy
        - "[Connor Aird](https://github.com/connoraird)"
        - "[Saransh Chopra](https://github.com/Saransh-cpp)"
        - "[Nicolas Tessore](https://github.com/ntessore)"
      path: festival-of-digital-research-innovation-scholarship-2026/index.svg
      subtitle: >-
        [Festival of Digital Research, Innovation & Scholarship
        2026](https://www.ucl.ac.uk/advanced-research-computing/events/2026/jun/festival-digital-research-innovation-scholarship)
      title: >-
        Porting GLASS to the Python Array API: A Clear View to GPU Portability
  date-format: iso
  exclude:
    title: Page Not Found
  field-display-names:
    subtitle: Event
  fields:
    - date
    - title
    - subtitle
    - author
  page-size: 10
  sort: date desc
  type: table
---
